title: The best response to AI slop and online noise is from Robin Williams
summary: 文章引用罗宾·威廉姆斯的观点，探讨如何应对AI生成的低质量内容和网络噪音。
translated_summary: The original is English, but the summary is already in Chinese. The article discusses how to respond to AI-generated slop and online noise, drawing inspiration from Robin Williams.
